subject: midway toll term sheet & loi - comments

emails.subject: FW: Midway Toll term sheet & LOI - comments
emails.subject_base: Midway Toll term sheet & LOI - comments
emails.body: FW: Midway Toll term sheet LOI comments In a seperate e-mail, I sent out the LOI to TECO which incorporated most of Fred's comments. On the tolling term sheet, I agree with Fred's comments. Kay where do we stand on having outside counsel review this? I have indicated to TECO that we will have a draft tolling term sheet to them by Wednesday. Please let me know. Thanks, Ben
